Changelog

Everything new in CraneCheck — features, improvements, and fixes shipped to make crane inspections safer and faster.

v1.2.0March 10, 2026

Wire rope tracking, bulk export, and mobile improvements

  • 🆕 NewWire rope inspection tracking with wear-and-tear photo comparison across inspection cycles
  • 🆕 NewBulk PDF export — download all inspection reports for a crane or jobsite in one click
  • ✨ ImprovedMobile camera integration now supports burst mode for faster multi-angle documentation
  • ✨ ImprovedDashboard load time reduced by 40% for accounts with 500+ cranes
  • 🐛 FixedResolved an issue where offline inspections occasionally duplicated on sync
  • 🐛 FixedFixed date picker not respecting timezone settings on inspection scheduling
v1.1.0February 3, 2026

OSHA report builder, team roles, and deficiency workflows

  • 🆕 NewOSHA-ready report builder — generate 29 CFR 1926.1412 compliant inspection summaries with one click
  • 🆕 NewTeam roles and permissions — assign Inspector, Supervisor, and Admin roles with granular access controls
  • ✨ ImprovedDeficiency tracking now supports photo annotations with arrows, circles, and text overlays
  • ✨ ImprovedInspection checklist templates load 3× faster on low-bandwidth connections
  • 🐛 FixedCorrected load chart reference links for Liebherr LTM series cranes
  • 🐛 FixedFixed an issue where inspection reminder emails were sent in UTC instead of the user's local timezone
v1.0.0January 6, 2026

CraneCheck launches — digital crane inspections built for the field

  • 🆕 NewComplete digital crane inspection platform with pre-built checklists for mobile, tower, and overhead cranes
  • 🆕 NewOffline-first mobile app — complete inspections without cell service and sync when connected
  • 🆕 NewPhoto and video documentation attached directly to inspection line items
  • 🆕 NewAutomated inspection scheduling with email and SMS reminders for operators and supervisors
  • 🆕 NewReal-time compliance dashboard showing inspection status across your entire fleet
  • 🆕 NewPDF report generation with company branding, digital signatures, and QR code verification

Stop gambling with paper checklists.

The next OSHA inspector won't accept “we lost that binder.” CraneCheck gives you digital, searchable, audit-proof inspection records — starting today.

OSHA-compliant crane inspection software that keeps your crews safe and your records audit-ready.
